overall.description: Video game footage from Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character standing on a rooftop water tower during a golden hour sunset. The camera performs a slow 360-degree rotation around the stationary character, revealing the cityscape, bridges, river, and passing helicopters.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop water tower overlooking arched bridge and highway

agents.ego_description: standing still on the water tower platform, facing the arched bridge and river

entered.detail: large suspension bridge with white arches spanning the river
multi-lane bridge with moving traffic and train tracks
wide river reflecting the golden sunset light
low-rise brick buildings and warehouses near the waterfront
circular metal grate water tower platform

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a circular metal platform atop a water tower, overlooking a large arched bridge and highway spanning a wide river. Industrial buildings line the waterfront as traffic moves across the bridge in the warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop water tower facing directly into sunset

events.description: camera rotates to face the setting sun, creating a strong backlit silhouette effect
helicopters appear in the sky against the bright sunset

agents.ego_description: standing still, silhouetted against the bright sunset

notable_agents.action: helicopters flying across the sunset sky in formation

entered.detail: bright setting sun low on the horizon creating lens flare
aircraft silhouetted against the orange sky

segments.scene_description: As the camera rotates to face the setting sun, the character is silhouetted against the bright golden sky. Helicopters fly across the horizon over the river, while the bridge fades from view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop water tower overlooking downtown skyscrapers

events.description: view transitions from sunset to reveal the dense city skyline with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: standing still, surveying the downtown skyline and tall buildings

entered.detail: prominent dark rectangular skyscraper with construction crane on top
cluster of modern glass and steel high-rise buildings
red steel arch bridge structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera continues rotating to reveal the downtown skyline, dominated by a tall dark skyscraper and modern glass buildings. The river shifts to the right side of the frame as the view completes its panoramic sweep of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous 360-degree camera rotation around a stationary character, transitioning from a view of industrial riverfront infrastructure to a sweeping panorama of a modern city skyline. It begins atop a circular metal water tower platform, looking out over a wide river where traffic flows across a large arched bridge under the warm glow of sunset. As the camera rotates toward the horizon, the character becomes a silhouette against the bright golden sky while helicopters drift across the distant river. The scene then shifts away from the bridge to reveal the downtown skyline, dominated by a tall dark skyscraper and sleek glass buildings. Finally, the river slides to the right of the frame as the camera completes its panoramic sweep of the urban landscape.
